title: VPN Dropping Multiple Users — Possible Outage

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Multiple users disconnected from VPN — FortiClient session drops after ~10 minutes
servicenow_seed.description: Three separate users in different departments opened tickets within 20 minutes reporting that their FortiClient VPN drops after approximately 10 minutes of use. IT has not pushed any VPN policy changes today. Users are on different physical sites.

correct_steps: Validate caller and confirm VPN client version and OS
Search for related tickets — confirm ≥3 users affected across different sites
Upgrade impact to 2 and urgency to 2 due to multi-user, multi-site pattern
Document the pattern in work notes
Escalate to Network Operations for FortiGate gateway investigation
Notify users that issue is being investigated and provide estimated ETA
rationale: A VPN session drop affecting multiple users across different physical sites is almost certainly a gateway or policy issue, not a local endpoint problem. It exceeds Tier 1 scope and requires Network Operations.
